resources.string: The application license validation has failed. If you purchased it from Android Market, please make sure that synchronization of your Google account is enabled (settings -> accounts) and try it again.
Popular Live Wallpaper makes you popular!

"This free version of Popular Live Wallpaper is fully functional. If you like it, support this project and get the full version with lots of customization options.
-Choose from two further stunning camera perspectives.
-Adjust the evolving of the ground texture.
-Change the altitude of the camera.
-Adjust the rate of the patterns and the influence of music.
-More patterns are available!
-Choose from different styles of waveform or spectrum illustration.
And more!"
